tasks.label: Create and Push Git Tag
args: set /p tag="Enter tag name (e.g., v1.0.0): " && if "%tag%"=="" (echo Tag name cannot be empty! && exit /b 1) else (git tag -a %tag% -m "Release %tag%" && git push github %tag%)
tasks.detail: Create an annotated tag and push it to GitHub (cmd)

tasks.label: Create Git Tag (Local)
args: set /p tag="Enter tag name (e.g., v1.0.0): " && if "%tag%"=="" (echo Tag name cannot be empty! && exit /b 1) else git tag -a %tag% -m "Release %tag%"
tasks.detail: Create a local annotated tag only (cmd)

tasks.label: Push All Tags
tasks.detail: Push all local tags to GitHub

tasks.label: Delete Local Tag
args: set /p tag="Enter tag name to delete (local): " && if "%tag%"=="" (echo Tag name cannot be empty! && exit /b 1) else git tag -d %tag%

tasks.label: Delete Remote Tag
args: set /p tag="Enter tag name to delete (remote): " && if "%tag%"=="" (echo Tag name cannot be empty! && exit /b 1) else git push github --delete %tag%
tasks.detail: Delete a remote tag from GitHub (cmd)
